name: Prankster 3D
author: Poki
description: Prankster 3D is a funny game where your mission is to outwit the infamous Scary Teacher! Join Nick in his epic rivalry as he unleashes a series of clever and playful pranks to teach her a lesson. Use your creativity to pick the best choices and set up the funniest tricks, ruining her plans in the most amusing ways. With endless laugh-out-loud moments, this game guarantees non-stop fun. Are you ready to become the ultimate prank master? How to play Prankster 3D? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD or the joystick to move. Who created Prankster 3D? Prankster 3D is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Pull the String Hide and Seek and School Escape! ! How can I play Prankster 3D for free? You can play Prankster 3D for free on Poki. Can I play Prankster 3D on mobile devices and desktop? Prankster 3D can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
